# Marcador

> Marcador is the scoreboard for World Cup 2026 predictions. Predict every matchday's six matches, boost a call, and climb the global table.

Marcador lets soccer fans predict scores for every World Cup 2026 match, compete on a global leaderboard, and run private mini-leagues with friends. Points are awarded for correct results and exact scores, with a 2× booster per matchday.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Landing page introducing Marcador and the World Cup 2026 prediction game.
- [Leaderboard](/leaderboard): Global standings ranking every player by points across the tournament.
- [Play](/play): Current matchday's six matches — public read-only view of the selected fixtures.

## Optional

- [Sign in or create an account](/auth): Required to submit predictions or join leagues.
